raw_consumer_statement:
I submitted a dispute on XX/XX/year>. I received a notice of decline on XX/XX/year>. It was declined because CITIBANK needed more information. I called CITI and requested an extension to get the additional information CITI was requiring. I spoke with XXXX on XX/XX/XXXX, and he supposedly gave me an extension. When I received my next statement on XX/XX/XXXX, the charge was still there, and I saw that XXXX had not given me the extension. 

I called CITI again on XX/XX/XXXX and spoke with XXXX, who apologized for XXXX 's XXXX. XXXX gave me an extension and a different dispute number. To be completely certain that she had done this, I again called CITI on XX/XX/XXXX. I reached XXXX in Kansas XXXX, who changed the dispute number and apologized for all that had been occurring. 

On XX/XX/XXXX. I sent CITI XXXX pages of documents regarding the dispute via my online account. I called CITI on or about XX/XX/XXXX to verify the receipt of these documents, and CITI confirmed. I am now awaiting the resolution of this dispute.
